programs.title: The Crow: Salvation
programs.desc: A mystical crow revives an innocent executed man (Eric Mabius) and helps him find a killer.

programs.title: Rampart
programs.desc: A veteran cop (Woody Harrelson) asserts his own code of justice on the streets.

programs.title: Killer Elite
programs.desc: A special-ops agent (Jason Statham) returns from self-imposed exile to rescue his kidnapped mentor.

programs.title: Kandahar
programs.desc: A CIA operative fights enemy combatants as he tries to reach an extraction point in Afghanistan.

programs.title: Grand Isle
programs.desc: A man accused of murder must reveal a couple's wicked secrets to save himself.

programs.title: Streets of Blood
programs.desc: Two New Orleans lawmen (Val Kilmer, 50 Cent) investigate the murder of an officer.
